task_completion.description: Verify the survey title and description are correctly set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the survey title 'Social Media Usage and Community Belonging Study 2024'. In the survey description field or overview, look for the text 'IRB Protocol #2024-SOC-0847' and 'Dr. Rebecca Thornton'.

task_completion.description: Verify the welcome and end messages contain the required ethical and contact keywords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the text elements or survey preview. The welcome message must contain 'informed consent', 'voluntary', and 'anonymous'. The end message must contain 'rthorn@stateuniv.edu' and 'Robert Putnam'.

task_completion.description: Verify data protection and presentation settings are correctly configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the survey settings menus (Presentation, Participant settings, Data policy). Verify: 'Anonymized responses' is ON/Yes, 'Date stamps' is ON/Yes, 'Save IP address' is OFF/No, 'Show data policy' is ON/visible, 'Format' is set to 'Group by Group', and 'Show progress bar' is ON/Yes.

task_completion.description: Verify the three required question groups have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the survey structure or group list. There must be exactly three groups named: 'Informed Consent', 'Social Media Usage', and 'Community Belonging'.

task_completion.description: Verify questions are added to the groups and the consent question is mandatory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the questions within the groups. Each of the three groups must have at least one question. The question inside the 'Informed Consent' group must be marked as mandatory (usually indicated by a red asterisk or a 'Mandatory: Yes' setting).

task_completion.description: Verify the survey has been activated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the top toolbar or survey overview. The status should indicate the survey is 'Active' (often a green indicator), or the button should say 'Stop this survey' instead of 'Activate this survey'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual LimeSurvey web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LimeSurvey admin dashboard (typically accessed via a web browser), not terminal commands or database manipulation scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not fake the survey creation using a text editor or HTML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show the local LimeSurvey URL (e.g., localhost or a local IP with the LimeSurvey path), not a file:// URI or a text editor interface.

integrity.description: Verify the activation status is genuine within the LimeSurvey UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The activation status should be part of the standard LimeSurvey interface elements, not manually typed text on a blank page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Title: 'Social Media Usage and Community Belonging Study 2024'. IRB Protocol: '2024-SOC-0847'. PI Name: 'Thornton' (Dr. Rebecca Thornton). Welcome message must include: 'informed consent', 'voluntary', 'anonymous'. End message must include: 'rthorn@stateuniv.edu', 'Putnam' (Robert Putnam). Expected Groups: 'Informed Consent', 'Social Media Usage', 'Community Belonging'.
